sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_nullif (id UInt32, value Nullable(Int32));
INSERT INTO test_nullif (id, value) VALUES (1, nullIf(1, 1)), (2, nullIf(2, 3));
UPDATE test_nullif SET value = nullIf(value, 2) WHERE id = 2;
SELECT id, nullIf(value, 3) AS updated_value FROM test_nullif;
SELECT nullIf(value, 0) FROM test_nullif WHERE id = 1;
